description: Sergey (Infantry) + Renee (Lancer) + Lynn (Marksman) — first 3-hero NC combo covering all three troop classes. All heroes fully deterministic (no chance skills), single run sufficient. minxxx defends with Sergey (S1=4/S2=4) + Renee (S1=4/S2=4/S3=4) + Lynn (S1=3/S2=3/S3=3). Tests cross-class DamageUp stacking at high skill levels. All three solos previously verified.
